title: Wall Space 12x10 Thin Black Frame | Thin Black Picture Frame 12x10 inches | Natural Wood 12x10 Black Frames | All Wooden 10x12 Black Picture Frames are made from SOLID WOOD and come with REAL GLASS
features: QUALITY WOODEN 12x10 PICTURE FRAMES: This 12x10 Frame is perfect for displaying your treasured photos, prints, poster or other art work. Easy to fit into, and simple to hang on a wall. 12x10 inch Frame made from REAL WOOD and with REAL GLASS

LONG LASTING MATERIALS: These 10x12 Black Frames are made by skilled picture framers using solid wood and REAL GLASS for optimal viewing of your pictures. This 10x12 Inch Frame size has a classic contemporary look which will look great in any home or office.

IDEAL FOR ANY OCCASION: Our 12 x 10 Black Frame is a great way to store and display your memories, achievements or favourite artwork. You can add an eye-catching display in your home or office, where this 12x10 Photo Frame will enhance your chosen decor whether for in your own home or as a gift for a chosen loved one.

LANDSCAPE or PORTRAIT DISPLAY: This Black 10x12 Frame can hang either vertically (portrait) or horizontally (landscape) thanks to it's built in hangers already attached to the back. Black Photo Frame 10x12 inches (or 305 mm x 254 mm in metric)

MADE IN THE UK: These Black 12 x 10 Frames are made in the UK by one of our skilled picture framers. As members of the Fine Art Trade Guild we hold ourselves to high standards and each and every picture frame 12 x 10 inches is meticulously checked and inspected after being made.
We are a leading UK Manufactuer of Real Wooden Picture Frames - CHECK OUT OUR FANTASTIC AMAZON REVIEWS! Buy 10x12 Picture Frames from the UK's most trusted picture frame manufacturer!
description: Product Description High Quality Black 12x10 Frame, 10x12 Frame Made from Solid Wood and with REAL Glass Thin 12 x 10 inch Black Picture Frames, Hand made in the UK by ourselves. Made from Solid Wood with a smooth matt black finish, these frames measure 15mm wide by 15mm deep. These thin black frames work in a variety of room settings, from home and kitchens to offices as well giving a sleek contemporary look. A 12x10 Black Frame can look great with a variety of different images. Manufacturing Quality Wooden Frames for Over 30 Years 10x12 Black Wooden Frames, with a Smooth Matt Finish and with REAL GLASS 12x10 Inch Black Frames with with Real Glass and Made from REAL WOOD Made to Last a Lifetime Our Thin 12x10 Black Frames are made to stand the test of time. Each frame is cut using our precision saw and joined by skilled picture framers. Each frame is checked and double checked before it leaves us. Easy to fit and Easy to Hang Simply bend the flexible tabs on the back up, remove the MDF back and fit your image into the 10x12 frame. To hang is even easier, just use the hangers on the back to hang on a picture hook or nail. Can be hung either portrait or landscape. Real Glass (Not plastic) We use real glass in all our 12 x 10 inch frames. Real glass gives a much improved clarity over styrene or acrylic and is much less prone to scratching when being cleaned. Carefully packed in Specialist Protective Packaging We've sent out thousands of frames over the years, and have perfected the art of packaging them to ensure they don't get damaged in transit. We have recently started using paper tapes and paper void fill which really helps with protecting the frames. 12x10 Black Frame with REAL Glass - Made in the UK Members of the Fine Art Trade Guild As members of the Fine Art Trade Guild we hold ourselves to very high standards when it comes to framing and making frames. All of our wooden ready made photo frames are made to the same high standard as one of our bespoke frames that we make to order. Utilising traditional framing techniques combined with the latest technology we can produce frames to a very high standard. We also supply the trade, hotels and anyone else who wishes to buy quality wooden frames.
